statement: In every magma, Equation 2953 (`x = ((y * (y * y)) * z) * y`) implies Equation 2938 (`x = ((y * (y * x)) * x) * z`).
lean_statement:
theorem problem_normal_0180
    {G : Type*} (op : G → G → G)
    (h : ∀ x y z : G, x = (op (op (op y (op y y)) z) y)) :
    ∀ x y z : G, x = (op (op (op y (op y x)) x) z)
